title: Dark's PvP Pack
description: This Modpack boosts FPS and optimizes Minecraft for smooth, fast-paced PvP battles.
body:
# Dark’s PvP Pack



**Dominate every fight with the ultimate PvP-focused Minecraft experience.**

**Dark’s PvP Pack**  is a Modpack which is designed for players who want smooth, high-performance PvP gameplay. Every duel, raid, or competitive fight feels faster, smoother, and more responsive. Optimized for FPS boost, low-lag performance, and combat efficiency, this pack gives you the edge you need to win.



## PvP-Focused Mods & Additions



Sodium & Lithium – Boost FPS and reduce lag.

Lower Shield & Low On Fire – See clearly while in combat.

Inventory HUD+ & Mouse Tweaks – Manage items faster.

Fresh Animations & Not Enough Animations – Smooth player and mob movements.

Simple Voice Chat – Communicate with teammates in real-time.

JEI & JER – Quick access to recipes and resources.

These mods and optimizations combine to give you the smoothest, most responsive PvP experience possible.



## Gameplay & Features
## 


Optimized for Combat: Higher FPS and smoother movement for fast-paced PvP.

Enhanced Visuals: Cleaner HUD, better lighting, and optional shaders.

Improved Inventory Management: Swap items, manage hotbar, and react faster.

Team Communication: Built-in voice chat support for coordinated gameplay.



## Multiplayer Support



Play with friends or compete on servers with smooth, lag-free gameplay.

Want to host your own server? Get instant setup and optimized performance at Wabbanodes.com and use code Dark for 25% off.



## Support & Community



Have a suggestion, question, or bug report? Join our Discord server for help and discussion:

https://discord.gg/M2C2RVGhdx



Dark’s PvP Pack is the perfect combination of speed, smoothness, and combat efficiency—made for players who want to win every fight.
